emails.subject: ISO
emails.body: ISO Hello, Chris. It was nice to meet you last Friday. I wanted to remind you to please re-email me those documents as soon as you get a chance. I'd like to get through those and have a plan re: dates, staff, etc. by mid-week this week. Please call if you have any questions. Thanks. Mechelle Atwood Director, Enron Assurance Services Enron Wholesale Services 713.345.4554; Location: EB2383 Mechelle.Atwood@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: ISO
emails.body: RE: ISO Mechelle, Sorry for the delay on getting you the documents in question. I currently can not get into Lotus Notes where all of the documents reside. The IT group is looking into the problem and I will get the documents to you the moment that I have access to Lotus Notes again. Chris To: Stokley, Chris

emails.subject: FW: ISO
emails.body: FW: ISO I think that these are all of the documents that you were unable to open from my previous e-mails. Chris To: Atwood, Mechelle
